title: Unofficial Data
body: Current candidate data has been unofficially sourced for comparison purposes only. Results may differ from official allocations. Await the official PMDC Induction 21 gazette for confirmed placements.

title: Data Notes
body: Some applicants appear without preferences or programme marks — this is as-received from the backend, not a site error. Additionally, service experience marks are present in the source data but excluded from merit ranking; base scores shown reflect MBBS aggregate + house job + position + MDCAT only.

title: PRP Data Unstable
body: Live data from the PRP portal is currently unstable — some applicants are showing drastically reduced marks (e.g. from ~15 down to ~1.6). This is NOT a MeritNama error. It appears the PRP system is glitching or their admins are making backend changes. Do not panic — your actual marks have not changed. We will refresh the data once PRP stabilises.
